non_passed_status_items.name: Phase 4 full EPNet training completion
non_passed_status_items.note: A checkpoint alone is not sufficient; this gate prevents intermediate epoch checkpoints from being treated as full reproduction completion.

non_passed_status_items.name: Phase 4B full HBTXR training completion
non_passed_status_items.note: A checkpoint alone is not sufficient; this gate prevents intermediate epoch checkpoints from being treated as full reproduction completion.

non_passed_status_items.name: Phase 4 EPNet fpn_dw ablation checkpoint
non_passed_status_items.note: The reproduction plan calls for fpn_2d baseline plus fpn_dw ablation for paper correspondence.

non_passed_status_items.name: Phase 4 EPNet fpn_dw ablation completion
non_passed_status_items.note: A checkpoint alone is not sufficient for the planned fpn_dw ablation.

non_passed_status_items.name: Phase 4B HBTXR effective-batch-32 checkpoint
non_passed_status_items.note: This stricter comparison run matches EPNet's effective batch size of 32.

non_passed_status_items.name: Phase 4B HBTXR effective-batch-32 completion
non_passed_status_items.note: A checkpoint alone is not sufficient for the planned fair effective-batch comparison.

non_passed_status_items.name: Phase 4 final evaluation artifacts
non_passed_status_items.note: Final reproduction requires both EPNet/FACET paper comparison and HBTXR-vs-EPNet comparison artifacts.

completion_rule: Goal completion requires the plan file to exist, every expected status item to be present and passed, grouped Phase 1-4B requirements to be passed, and final full-validation artifacts to be accepted by the status checker.
